name: Case Study Example
history: Recurrent dreams during graduate school about being unprepared for a thesis defense. Father described as having high expectations.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must be perfect to be accepted.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I am not perfect, I will be rejected and criticized.
coping_strategies: Over-preparing and seeking reassurance to avoid criticism.
situation: Experiencing a recurring dream in which coworkers talk negatively about the individual.
auto_thought: They will see my flaws and reject me.
behavior: Avoidance of situations where performance is evaluated.
